programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle in for The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer, Saturday Night Live UK, Britains Got Talent, The Hunt: Prey vs Predator, Celebrity Sabotage, Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen, The Dog House and BBC News on Easter egg inflation

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Jess and Ben reveal a love of nudism and a desire to make the transition from the naturist scene to a non-monogamous lifestyle. However, Jesss hatred of social situations must first be conquered. Elsewhere, Kirsty and Tom have the opportunity to take a giant leap in opening their relationship by having bisexual experiences with the retreats residents and consider attending a huge orgy

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The Predators band together and ruthlessly round on one player, whose survival hangs in the balance. Meanwhile, one of the contests closest alliances is put in peril. There is an unexpected change of fortune, as one player goes from underdog to top dog. After one of the toughest hunts yet, the players return to base, where politics and power plays kick in, before another of the group is culled from the contest

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Nabil Abdulrashid and Charlotte Church for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, compete to host the best dinner party, and win a £1,000 prize. The contestants taking part are fine-dining enthusiasts Dan and Jacqui, lovebirds Hannah and Lucy, and final pair Edyta and Simon - who treat their guests to an international menu

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect is in Stratford-upon-Avon, where he helps Laura and Jonnie to transform their Edwardian mock Tudor house into a modern family home. George also meets Nicki, whose 1920s cottage in Essex needs major changes to make it more accessible

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A TV agent visits the bar and offers Sam a contract doing beer commercials - but soon makes it clear she doesnt want their relationship to be purely professional. Ted Danson stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Preoccupied with the ball game on TV, nobody pays much attention to Dianes sadness over the death of her family cat. It is left to Sam to discover the reason for Dianes grief. Meanwhile, Sam and Coach use insider information to make a bet

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane is aghast when Carla tricks the surprised but ecstatic Marshall Lipton into believing he is the father of her unborn child. Bar-room comedy, starring Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray realises that the angrier Debra gets, the better their sex life becomes - so he decides to stir up conflict between her and Marie. American comedy, starring Patricia Heaton, Doris Roberts and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Members of the parent-teacher association complain about Debras outfits, leaving Ray facing the delicate task of persuading her to dress more conservatively in future. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally comes home with a low grade on her report card. Ray is inclined to blame the teacher, but it turns out there is another reason why she is feeling distracted in class. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star, with Madylin Sweeten

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A classy restaurant awards the shrink a place on its wall of fame, but he takes exception to the caricature of himself and tries to persuade the head waiter to replace it with a more flattering likeness. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphnes brother turns up at the wedding, bringing nothing with him but an unquenchable thirst for alcohol and a squadron of drinking pals. Meanwhile, the bride finally becomes aware of Niless feelings for her. Comedy, guest starring Anthony LaPaglia, with David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Something Borrowed, Someone Blue - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The shrink proffers romantic advice to both Niles and Daphne, hoping that they will admit their mutual affection. However, it remains to be seen whether they will have the nerve to be honest with each other before her impending marriage to Donny

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Something Borrowed, Someone Blue - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As Daphne prepares to tie the knot with Donny, her family arrives for the wedding of the year and Niles struggles with his feelings for her

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion of Gordon Ramsays visit to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, he confronts sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum, and finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the Italian restaurants failings

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole decides that he needs to restore a forklift truck, while Simon OBrien gets all zen with a stone water feature

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Its lambing season and the family are eagerly awaiting the arrival of the first black Welsh mountain sheep to be born on the farm. Matt begins work on his dream woodland hut and wildlife hideaway and Nicola, Luke and Molly do their best to make the pond area more accessible for Mike and Janice

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gary and Alison from south Staffordshire are seeking a rural holiday home in the Haute-Vienne area of central France. For their budget of £100,000, expert Laura Hamilton lines up five properties, but will any of them prove suitable enough to prompt the pair into making an offer?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, Mark and Gary find out if their gite will be awarded the coveted five-star rating and in Portugal, there are kitchen problems and toilet troubles at Richard and Simons bar on their busy opening weekend. In Italy, missing paperwork prevents Lisa and Paul from opening their newly renovated apartment and Becky and Gav have a mountain to climb to complete their new home and holiday lets in the Pyrenees

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its been a week packed full of history in Kent, and thats no different at Sabans 700-year-old Stone Court House in Maidstone. The heritage character of his place is an instant hit, and the BandBers get some much-needed bonding done during a trip along the River Medway. But the smooth waters dont last long, as evening drinks turn terrifically tense

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host in Sheffield, Leon, is hoping to inject some spice into the competition with a scorching Caribbean supper. But when Leon dishes up a fiery main course, a few nervous stomachs rumble. Leon keeps himself in the spotlight with some impromptu warbling, but will his guests join in or struggle to hide their awkward discomfort? Hes soon in hot water, as he struggles to place names to faces despite being three nights in

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine gets hands-on as the patio is dug up and the family bathroom is demolished. Liliana Myers, widow of Hairy Biker Dave Myers, drops in to see how her friend Jon has settled into his new life, and all seems to be going well - until a medical emergency puts everything on hold

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: In Nottinghamshire, Laura has snapped up a 100-year-old abandoned bungalow with ivy growing under the wallpaper. Mortgage-free in her mid-thirties, shes determined to create her dream home. But funds are tight, so she has to roll up her sleeves and tackle much of the renovation herself. In Stoke-on-Trent, Tariq has taken ownership of a local landmark - the former Minton Library. To fund the restoration of its historic tiles, he plans to transform the upper floors into an events venue. The pressures on, as he has just eight weeks until he hosts his first wedding, but spiralling costs and looming deadlines threaten to derail everything. Plus, behind the scenes at the East Anglia Auction House where a tiny plot of land sparks a bidding frenzy, and the new owners of what locals call Norfolks creepiest house face a big decision - demolish or restore?

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Britain is at war, and Emma frantically searches for a way to keep her businesses afloat. She has an ingenious plan, but its a huge gamble. Meanwhile, the men in Emmas life decide whether to sign up and risk their lives for their country. When a guilt-ridden Edwin enlists, Adam is willing to do anything to stop him, even prising open the past. In the 1970s, Paula and Emma are reunited as Paula rushes to warn her grandmother of a surprise twist in the coup against her

programme.title: Hatton Garden: The Great Diamond Heist
programme.desc: In 2015, a gang of ageing criminals carried out one of the most audacious heists in British history, stealing a multi-million-pound haul of jewellery and gold from a high-security vault in Londons Hatton Garden diamond district. More than a decade after the heist, what happened to the gang, and what happened to the missing millions? Insiders, including one of the crew who carried out the heist, reveal the extraordinary twists, turns and betrayals which followed the heist and eventually led to the gangs capture

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Andy, 36, is brought in after a motorcycle accident with a fractured femur that needs realignment. Staff fear 27-year-old Connor, who has fallen off a roof, may have bleeding on his brain. In the urgent treatment unit, 25-year-old Adrian has suffered injuries to his face and been bitten on his arm after breaking up a fight in the city centre

programme.title: Britains Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Broker Constance is on a mission to get the listing for Laura Comforts £12.5million home as the celebrity singer wants to downsize to a £4million pad in Chelsea. Managing director Guy values a quaint Tudor cottage in Henley on Thames - a little corner of paradise that owner Brian is selling for the not insignificant sum of £1.75million. It boasts a swimming pool and a shower in a former phone box

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the BandBs wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: Thanks to his race car driver owner, golden retriever Enzo learns that the techniques needed on the racetrack can also be used to successfully navigate the journey of life. Comedy drama, starring Milo Ventimiglia and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Essex couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Asset manager Amie and husband Mark got married one year previously, and Amie believes she is in charge of both the relationship and the kitchen. Teacher Nathan unleashes some home truths about his partner - veterinary nurse Gemma - while Simon and Suzanne find themselves under pressure when things heat up in the kitchen

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Birmingham, Kirstie Allsopp helps 30-year-old neurosurgeon Naomi escape from a crowded shared house, guiding her through the property market of Moseley. Meanwhile, Phil Spencer has a challenge on his hands with a couple who want completely different things. Jon is looking for a one-bedroom flat in the citys stylish Jewellery Quarter, but Mo dreams of a quieter life

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam supports his former baseball team-mate Tom when he comes out of the closet in his new autobiography, hosting the book promotion press event at the bar

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane challenge each other to find their perfect dates, but he ends up grabbing a highly unsuitable partner for her from the pool room who isnt quite what she had in mind. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane is furious to learn Sam has entered a photo of her for the Miss Boston Barmaid contest - until it dawns on her that she can use the media attention as a platform for her opinions. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Frank are pressured by their wives to join Robert in one of his therapy sessions - but the three of them decide to go to the racetrack instead

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra invites her divorced parents to Thanksgiving dinner, and Raymond sees something shocking that convinces him they are getting back together. The truth, however, proves far stranger. Robert Culp and Katherine Helmond guest star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is annoyed to discover Marie is plying his brother with gifts of scented candles and massage oils. However, his mood changes when he deduces her real motive - to put Robert in a romantic mood, in the hope he will provide her with grandchildren

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: And the Dish Ran Away with the Spoon
programme.desc: Double-length episode. Donny issues a lawsuit against Daphne for jilting him at the altar, and Mel plots revenge against Niles after he abandoned his marriage to her. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce, Jane Leeves and Saul Rubinek

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A lovestruck Frasier persuades Martin to look round a retirement home because he wants to meet the establishments attractive manager. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Mel tries to embarrass Niles, and Frasier is aghast to discover the new station owner has copied the decor of his apartment in a bid to appear sophisticated. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents restaurant, Sals Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after Johns mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Lancashire where Simon finds a 1980s glass cabinet he wants to turn into a modern grandfather clock. Henry picks up a drum kit and decides to relive his youth

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Lambing season continues and this time is the turn of the Herdwicks. There are high hopes for a successful year, but when one of the ewes rejects a lamb, the family has to step in

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sharon and Brendon from East Sussex have dreamt of owning their own place in northern Italy for years, and theyve decided that nows the perfect time to buy a holiday home on the shores of beautiful Lake Garda to use as a base for their travels. But they each have very different priorities. Can Lucy Alexander fulfil both of their dreams for their £225,000 budget?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A bar in Portugal relaunches after closing for a week, but still needs a new manager. In Italy, a drought causes cancellations while, in France, a mattress proves too large to get up the stairs

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Mark and Annes luxurious Old Town House in Margate. The decor delights and a splash on the famous beach in the afternoon go down a treat, but Saban cant help but ruminate on his own feedback, making for an icy atmosphere over ice cream

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On night four in Sheffield, Lindsey dishes up antioxidant-stuffed hearty home-cooked fare, but one guest compares her soup to baby food, and the culinary chaos intensifies when a staunch seafood-hater reluctantly samples her fish pie and promptly retches at the table. With her dinner in freefall, a bizarre round of toe wrestling provides a welcome, if strange, interlude, crammed with screams and nervous giggles

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: The property expert and her family continue their transformation of a run-down Spanish villa. Despite Jons accident, the building work continues as Jasmines father comes over from London to help with the decorating, and fellow presenter Laura Hamilton tries to lift Jasmines spirits with a trip into Málaga. Later, son Albion gets to see his finished bedroom - will he like it?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: Daniel, Laura and their son Archie have moved to the Essex island of Mersea, where Laura and all her family grew up, and she wants little Archie to enjoy a unique, idyllic childhood like the one she had there. To make that dream come true, theyve bought what is little more than an old, drafty, cramped beach house just a stones throw from the seaside which they plan to transform into a modern, sustainable family home, on a budget of £50,000. That money needs to stretch to raising the roof to build a whole new second floor to fit in bedrooms, creating a new steel skeleton for the wooden walls, and insulating the whole house

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: The war rages on. Emma is a widow and a single mother; business is failing and an unlikely alliance could be her only lifeline. In the 1970s, Emma returns home to Yorkshire for her 80th birthday party, armed with a cunning plan to outmanoeuvre her traitorous children, but another unseen betrayal is on the cards

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.sub-title: Click to Kill: The AI War Machine
programme.desc: With unique access in Ukraine, with the US army, and from within Israel, Dispatches charts the new technological arms race and asks whether these tools will make warfare more precise and reduce civilian casualties; or will they lead to more wars that are ever more brutal?

programme.title: Taskmaster: Champion of Champions
programme.desc: Previous victors Sam Campbell, John Robins, Andy Zaltzman and Mathew Baynton return to the show, alongside recent series winner Maisie Adam, to take on yet another selection of outlandish challenges - aware that only one of them will have the honour of taking home the ultimate prize of host Greg Davies body forged in gold

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham, an incident causes Jamaican-born security guard Weston to reveal the challenges of working on the hospital frontline, where incidents of aggression, violence and harassment are on the rise. Plus, the mother of a seven-year-old patient talks about the patience it takes to care for a neurodiverse child

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Predator turns on Predator, as one player puts friendship above the brutal demands of the game. But will their loyalty be rewarded, or seal their fate in the cull? As another player goes all-out to undermine their biggest threat, feuds intensify, leading to a shocking turn of events during the cull and sparking a fiery, emotional clash that sets new rivalries alight

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Seven players remain, all vying to win up to £100,000. But with five Predators and only two Prey, the competition must undergo a reset. As the rules of the game take a radical new direction, theres a brutal surprise for one player and a dramatic reversal of fortune for another. But its an agonising, heart-breaking decision forced onto one Prey that provides the biggest upset of the game so far

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Political journalist Lewis Goodall assesses the origins of the downfall in popularity of the Labour government, from party infighting to policy U-turns, courting Donald Trump, the Mandelson-Epstein scandal, high-profile ministerial resignations and a by-election battleground. Lewis speaks to MPs, advisors and pollsters, as well as celebrity critics and journalists, and follows the unfolding story as the police make arrests, opposition closes in, and the clamour for information intensifies over what Keir Starmer and his top team knew about Mandelson and Epstein

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from Cardiff and Newport compete to host the best dinner party and win £1,000 cash prize. Outspoken sisters Sue and Joyce do not enjoy the Asian-themed sushi offerings from Rachel and Mark, while discerning snail-breeding French foodie Philippe and his British wife Trish prove tough to impress

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.sub-title: Brilliant Builds: Biggest Builds and Complete Overhauls
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at two of their biggest builds. In Huddersfield, Paul and Dawn Welham-Campbells higgledy-piggledy layout simply does not work for them any more. Kirstie gets the sledgehammer out, while Phil searches for properties to rival Paul and Dawns own. In Woodford, east London, Keeley and Terrence Stamp are also at loggerheads. Keeleys fed up that their family of five is bursting out of their three bedrooms and one bathroom, and that their open plan lounge is basically one big noisy thoroughfare. Which of the property duo will come up with the best solution to their problems?

programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam discovers Coach is being taken for a ride by a so-called friend, so he and the regulars plot to beat the con-artist at his own game. Nicholas Colasanto stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane learsn that if she is not married within 24 hours, her mother with lose her inheritance from her late husbands estate. In light of such developments, Diane asks Sam to marry her on a strict business basis. Shelley Long stars

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amys brother Peter turns to Ray for advice on talking to women, while Debra decides to help out by throwing a party and inviting all her single friends

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra nags Raymond to tidy up after himself, but he is more concerned with a letter he has received from his sporting hero - which accidentally ends up in the bin

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An offhand comment to the twins new friend has dire consequences for Ray, who cannot understand why everyone is so upset - but he compounds his error by accidentally repeating the remark to the boys father. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, compete to host the best dinner party, and win a £1,000 prize. The contestants taking part are fine-dining enthusiasts Dan and Jacqui, lovebirds Hannah and Lucy, and final pair Edyta and Simon - who treat their guests to an international menu

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect is in Stratford-upon-Avon, where he helps Laura and Jonnie to transform their Edwardian mock Tudor house into a modern family home. George also meets Nicki, whose 1920s cottage in Essex needs major changes to make it more accessible

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A TV agent visits the bar and offers Sam a contract doing beer commercials - but soon makes it clear she doesnt want their relationship to be purely professional. Ted Danson stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Preoccupied with the ball game on TV, nobody pays much attention to Dianes sadness over the death of her family cat. It is left to Sam to discover the reason for Dianes grief. Meanwhile, Sam and Coach use insider information to make a bet

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane is aghast when Carla tricks the surprised but ecstatic Marshall Lipton into believing he is the father of her unborn child. Bar-room comedy, starring Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray realises that the angrier Debra gets, the better their sex life becomes - so he decides to stir up conflict between her and Marie. American comedy, starring Patricia Heaton, Doris Roberts and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Members of the parent-teacher association complain about Debras outfits, leaving Ray facing the delicate task of persuading her to dress more conservatively in future. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally comes home with a low grade on her report card. Ray is inclined to blame the teacher, but it turns out there is another reason why she is feeling distracted in class. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star, with Madylin Sweeten

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A classy restaurant awards the shrink a place on its wall of fame, but he takes exception to the caricature of himself and tries to persuade the head waiter to replace it with a more flattering likeness. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphnes brother turns up at the wedding, bringing nothing with him but an unquenchable thirst for alcohol and a squadron of drinking pals. Meanwhile, the bride finally becomes aware of Niless feelings for her. Comedy, guest starring Anthony LaPaglia, with David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Something Borrowed, Someone Blue - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The shrink proffers romantic advice to both Niles and Daphne, hoping that they will admit their mutual affection. However, it remains to be seen whether they will have the nerve to be honest with each other before her impending marriage to Donny

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Something Borrowed, Someone Blue - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As Daphne prepares to tie the knot with Donny, her family arrives for the wedding of the year and Niles struggles with his feelings for her

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion of Gordon Ramsays visit to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, he confronts sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum, and finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the Italian restaurants failings

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole decides that he needs to restore a forklift truck, while Simon OBrien gets all zen with a stone water feature

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Its lambing season and the family are eagerly awaiting the arrival of the first black Welsh mountain sheep to be born on the farm. Matt begins work on his dream woodland hut and wildlife hideaway and Nicola, Luke and Molly do their best to make the pond area more accessible for Mike and Janice

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gary and Alison from south Staffordshire are seeking a rural holiday home in the Haute-Vienne area of central France. For their budget of £100,000, expert Laura Hamilton lines up five properties, but will any of them prove suitable enough to prompt the pair into making an offer?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, Mark and Gary find out if their gite will be awarded the coveted five-star rating and in Portugal, there are kitchen problems and toilet troubles at Richard and Simons bar on their busy opening weekend. In Italy, missing paperwork prevents Lisa and Paul from opening their newly renovated apartment and Becky and Gav have a mountain to climb to complete their new home and holiday lets in the Pyrenees

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its been a week packed full of history in Kent, and thats no different at Sabans 700-year-old Stone Court House in Maidstone. The heritage character of his place is an instant hit, and the BandBers get some much-needed bonding done during a trip along the River Medway. But the smooth waters dont last long, as evening drinks turn terrifically tense

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host in Sheffield, Leon, is hoping to inject some spice into the competition with a scorching Caribbean supper. But when Leon dishes up a fiery main course, a few nervous stomachs rumble. Leon keeps himself in the spotlight with some impromptu warbling, but will his guests join in or struggle to hide their awkward discomfort? Hes soon in hot water, as he struggles to place names to faces despite being three nights in

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine gets hands-on as the patio is dug up and the family bathroom is demolished. Liliana Myers, widow of Hairy Biker Dave Myers, drops in to see how her friend Jon has settled into his new life, and all seems to be going well - until a medical emergency puts everything on hold

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: In Nottinghamshire, Laura has snapped up a 100-year-old abandoned bungalow with ivy growing under the wallpaper. Mortgage-free in her mid-thirties, shes determined to create her dream home. But funds are tight, so she has to roll up her sleeves and tackle much of the renovation herself. In Stoke-on-Trent, Tariq has taken ownership of a local landmark - the former Minton Library. To fund the restoration of its historic tiles, he plans to transform the upper floors into an events venue. The pressures on, as he has just eight weeks until he hosts his first wedding, but spiralling costs and looming deadlines threaten to derail everything. Plus, behind the scenes at the East Anglia Auction House where a tiny plot of land sparks a bidding frenzy, and the new owners of what locals call Norfolks creepiest house face a big decision - demolish or restore?

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Britain is at war, and Emma frantically searches for a way to keep her businesses afloat. She has an ingenious plan, but its a huge gamble. Meanwhile, the men in Emmas life decide whether to sign up and risk their lives for their country. When a guilt-ridden Edwin enlists, Adam is willing to do anything to stop him, even prising open the past. In the 1970s, Paula and Emma are reunited as Paula rushes to warn her grandmother of a surprise twist in the coup against her

programme.title: Hatton Garden: The Great Diamond Heist
programme.desc: In 2015, a gang of ageing criminals carried out one of the most audacious heists in British history, stealing a multi-million-pound haul of jewellery and gold from a high-security vault in Londons Hatton Garden diamond district. More than a decade after the heist, what happened to the gang, and what happened to the missing millions? Insiders, including one of the crew who carried out the heist, reveal the extraordinary twists, turns and betrayals which followed the heist and eventually led to the gangs capture

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The East Anglian Air Ambulance crew fight to save their patients partially amputated hand in Stowmarket and a crew in High Wycombe to help a man in cardiac arrest. The Essex and Herts Air Ambulance team deal with Beckys badly broken ankle in Chelmsford and in Hatfield, a motorcyclist suffers multiple injuries after a collision with a van

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham, an incident causes Jamaican-born security guard Weston to reveal the challenges of working on the hospital frontline, where incidents of aggression, violence and harassment are on the rise. Plus, the mother of a seven-year-old patient talks about the patience it takes to care for a neurodiverse child

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the BandBs wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: Thanks to his race car driver owner, golden retriever Enzo learns that the techniques needed on the racetrack can also be used to successfully navigate the journey of life. Comedy drama, starring Milo Ventimiglia and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Essex couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Asset manager Amie and husband Mark got married one year previously, and Amie believes she is in charge of both the relationship and the kitchen. Teacher Nathan unleashes some home truths about his partner - veterinary nurse Gemma - while Simon and Suzanne find themselves under pressure when things heat up in the kitchen

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Birmingham, Kirstie Allsopp helps 30-year-old neurosurgeon Naomi escape from a crowded shared house, guiding her through the property market of Moseley. Meanwhile, Phil Spencer has a challenge on his hands with a couple who want completely different things. Jon is looking for a one-bedroom flat in the citys stylish Jewellery Quarter, but Mo dreams of a quieter life

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane is furious to learn Sam has entered a photo of her for the Miss Boston Barmaid contest - until it dawns on her that she can use the media attention as a platform for her opinions. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Frank are pressured by their wives to join Robert in one of his therapy sessions - but the three of them decide to go to the racetrack instead

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra invites her divorced parents to Thanksgiving dinner, and Raymond sees something shocking that convinces him they are getting back together. The truth, however, proves far stranger. Robert Culp and Katherine Helmond guest star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is annoyed to discover Marie is plying his brother with gifts of scented candles and massage oils. However, his mood changes when he deduces her real motive - to put Robert in a romantic mood, in the hope he will provide her with grandchildren

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: And the Dish Ran Away with the Spoon

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A lovestruck Frasier persuades Martin to look round a retirement home because he wants to meet the establishments attractive manager. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Mel tries to embarrass Niles, and Frasier is aghast to discover the new station owner has copied the decor of his apartment in a bid to appear sophisticated. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents restaurant, Sals Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after Johns mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Lancashire where Simon finds a 1980s glass cabinet he wants to turn into a modern grandfather clock. Henry picks up a drum kit and decides to relive his youth

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Lambing season continues and this time is the turn of the Herdwicks. There are high hopes for a successful year, but when one of the ewes rejects a lamb, the family has to step in

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sharon and Brendon from East Sussex have dreamt of owning their own place in northern Italy for years, and theyve decided that nows the perfect time to buy a holiday home on the shores of beautiful Lake Garda to use as a base for their travels. But they each have very different priorities. Can Lucy Alexander fulfil both of their dreams for their £225,000 budget?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A bar in Portugal relaunches after closing for a week, but still needs a new manager. In Italy, a drought causes cancellations while, in France, a mattress proves too large to get up the stairs

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Mark and Annes luxurious Old Town House in Margate. The decor delights and a splash on the famous beach in the afternoon go down a treat, but Saban cant help but ruminate on his own feedback, making for an icy atmosphere over ice cream

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On night four in Sheffield, Lindsey dishes up antioxidant-stuffed hearty home-cooked fare, but one guest compares her soup to baby food, and the culinary chaos intensifies when a staunch seafood-hater reluctantly samples her fish pie and promptly retches at the table. With her dinner in freefall, a bizarre round of toe wrestling provides a welcome, if strange, interlude, crammed with screams and nervous giggles

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: The property expert and her family continue their transformation of a run-down Spanish villa. Despite Jons accident, the building work continues as Jasmines father comes over from London to help with the decorating, and fellow presenter Laura Hamilton tries to lift Jasmines spirits with a trip into Málaga. Later, son Albion gets to see his finished bedroom - will he like it?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: Daniel, Laura and their son Archie have moved to the Essex island of Mersea, where Laura and all her family grew up, and she wants little Archie to enjoy a unique, idyllic childhood like the one she had there. To make that dream come true, theyve bought what is little more than an old, drafty, cramped beach house just a stones throw from the seaside which they plan to transform into a modern, sustainable family home, on a budget of £50,000. That money needs to stretch to raising the roof to build a whole new second floor to fit in bedrooms, creating a new steel skeleton for the wooden walls, and insulating the whole house

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: The war rages on. Emma is a widow and a single mother; business is failing and an unlikely alliance could be her only lifeline. In the 1970s, Emma returns home to Yorkshire for her 80th birthday party, armed with a cunning plan to outmanoeuvre her traitorous children, but another unseen betrayal is on the cards

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.sub-title: Click to Kill: The AI War Machine
programme.desc: With unique access in Ukraine, with the US army, and from within Israel, Dispatches charts the new technological arms race and asks whether these tools will make warfare more precise and reduce civilian casualties; or will they lead to more wars that are ever more brutal?

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Andy, 36, is brought in after a motorcycle accident with a fractured femur that needs realignment. Staff fear 27-year-old Connor, who has fallen off a roof, may have bleeding on his brain. In the urgent treatment unit, 25-year-old Adrian has suffered injuries to his face and been bitten on his arm after breaking up a fight in the city centre

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Larks in Transit
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the 2020 Strictly champion in which he became the first British comedian to tread the boards of the Royal Opera House in Covent Garden, sharing tales from more than 20 years as a travelling performer. Topics include Google reviews of Poundland stores, a unique proposal for a Victorian-style Love Island and Old MacDonald sung in the style of Tom Waits. With a guest appearance by soprano Florence Hvorostovsky

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Predator turns on Predator, as one player puts friendship above the brutal demands of the game. But will their loyalty be rewarded, or seal their fate in the cull? As another player goes all-out to undermine their biggest threat, feuds intensify, leading to a shocking turn of events during the cull and sparking a fiery, emotional clash that sets new rivalries alight

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Seven players remain, all vying to win up to £100,000. But with five Predators and only two Prey, the competition must undergo a reset. As the rules of the game take a radical new direction, theres a brutal surprise for one player and a dramatic reversal of fortune for another. But its an agonising, heart-breaking decision forced onto one Prey that provides the biggest upset of the game so far

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Political journalist Lewis Goodall assesses the origins of the downfall in popularity of the Labour government, from party infighting to policy U-turns, courting Donald Trump, the Mandelson-Epstein scandal, high-profile ministerial resignations and a by-election battleground. Lewis speaks to MPs, advisors and pollsters, as well as celebrity critics and journalists, and follows the unfolding story as the police make arrests, opposition closes in, and the clamour for information intensifies over what Keir Starmer and his top team knew about Mandelson and Epstein

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from Cardiff and Newport compete to host the best dinner party and win £1,000 cash prize. programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.sub-title: Brilliant Builds: Biggest Builds and Complete Overhauls
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at two of their biggest builds. In Huddersfield, Paul and Dawn Welham-Campbells higgledy-piggledy layout simply does not work for them any more. Kirstie gets the sledgehammer out, while Phil searches for properties to rival Paul and Dawns own. In Woodford, east London, Keeley and Terrence Stamp are also at loggerheads. Keeleys fed up that their family of five is bursting out of their three bedrooms and one bathroom, and that their open plan lounge is basically one big noisy thoroughfare. Which of the property duo will come up with the best solution to their problems?

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Soap Opera Party

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fertility Test
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica go to a fertility clinic for tests, but are embarrassed to encounter an old acquaintance. Ross helps Joey pretend to be intelligent to woo Charlie, even though he is attracted to her himself, and Rachel sneaks into a spa for a massage

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler conduct an embarrassing interview with a potential sperm donor after learning they cannot conceive a baby naturally. Rachel reveals she still has feelings for Joey, but his current girlfriend overhears her confession, and Phoebe bumps into her old boyfriend David. Comedy, guest starring John Stamos and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts an evening of entertainment, recorded in front of an audience assembled at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. Each week, Michael introduces sets by his fellow stand-ups, musical performances, dance revues and various other hijinks. He begins by inviting RandB star Tinie Tempah to perform, and the Peres Brothers Group put on a dazzling acrobatic show. The host also hijacks former Spice Girl Geri Horners mobile phone in Celebrity Send To All, which sees him fire of an embassassing message to all the contacts in her directory, and one unsuspecting member of the public is given a chance to sing a special duet with Michael Ball in Unexpected Star

programme.title: The Ricky Gervais Show
programme.desc: Stephen Merchant and Karl Pilkington join Ricky to discuss some of their earliest memories. programme.title: The Ricky Gervais Show

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy chats non-stop through a basketball game, and Ray responds by suggesting to Robert that she talks too much - a criticism she does not take well. Comedy, starring Monica Horan and Ray Romano

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Joey and Rachel Kiss

programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Is Fine

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross goes to a spray-tanning salon, but his failure to follow the instructions leaves him with a complexion he was not looking for. Joey and Rachel prepare to sleep together for the first time, but the night proves more awkward than romantic. Guest starring Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Ian uses the £12,000 budget to fly him and his two best men out to Thailand to buy cut-price suits and a bargain wedding dress - and have an exotic stag do too. However, his trip may not pay off in the long run for his down-to-earth bride Jay

programme.desc: Rock star-turned-zookeeper Scott plans a jungle-themed wedding for his bride-to-be Verity - and spends only £100 on a wedding dress for her, and £1,800 on life-size plastic animals to decorate their reception

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Dave, a would-be groom with an obsessive fondness for the sea plans to whisk his water-phobic fiancee Rosie off for a remote wedding on wind-swept Lundy Island off the coast of Devon. programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Popular chef Jamie Olivers latest menu features ham, egg and chips with a Jamaican jerk rub and caramelised pineapple, chicken kebab served with houmous and mango amba sauce, and a three-tiered chocolate sponge cake complete with nougat frosting

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a birthday surprise for her friend, whipping up an Italian seafood salad and German chocolate cupcakes

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 10 remaining home-bakers must steel themselves to face the full force of Paul Hollywoods discerning eye as bread week arrives. For the signature bake, the contestants are given an hour-and-a-half to prepare quick breads with no proving - which results in creative flavours such as sweet chocolate loaves and manchego and prosciutto-stuffed bread coming to the fore. Next up is the technical challenge, in which Paul lulls the bakers into a false sense of security by asking them to make baguettes, a relatively simple task that concludes with the male judge delivering one of his most brutal verdicts yet. Finally, a bicycle, a snake, a lion and even Brighton Pavilion find their way into the tents ovens as the showstopper challenge sees the competitors crafting edible 3D bread sculptures

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins usher the nine remaining home-bakers back into the tent for the fourth week of the contest. This time, the competitors must tackle desserts, beginning with a signature challenge in the form of a French classic - creme brulees. With the clock ticking, the contestants must grill their offerings to perfection to avoid serving up an unappetising scrambled egg and custard soup. Next up is the technical challenge, in which Mary Berry asks the group to prepare Spanische Windtorte, an Austrian meringue inspired by the tastes of Spain, Switzerland and France. Finally, the showstopper this week involves baking a three-tiered cheesecake stack, and only the most structurally sound creations will be worthy of securing their maker the title of star baker

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James joins up with fellow chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen to explore Whitby, in James home county of North Yorkshire. James pops into his favourite fish and chip shop before cooking tikka mackerel buns with fennel and apple salad for the crowds at Whitby bandstand. Lisa, meanwhile, pays a visit to Michelin-starred restaurant The Black Swan, to see how its huge kitchen garden provides almost all of the produce used in the kitchen

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James is joined by chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen in Lancashire, where they visit a food hall and a brewery in Clitheroe, as well Lisas Michelin-starred restaurant Northcote in the village of Langho. Along the way they prepare barbecued John Dory with kohlrabi and fennel salad, Blackburn and Eccles cakes with a selection of cheeses and a classic lamb hot pot

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Mississippi Adventure
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers visit the hotbed of Cajun culture in Lafayette, Louisiana, where they sample crawfish and groove at a jam session

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree and her son, Todd, make creamy chicken cacciatore soup, Parmesan herb drop biscuits and dark chocolate cheesecake for her father and stepmother

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree answers questions from friends and Pawhuska locals. Plus, she shares her chicken fajita salad, pepperoni potato salad and southern Panzanella recipes

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares a hearty fish pie, helped by his son Buddy, with a fish curry using coconut milk and spinach for the sauce. He also makes gnudi - like gnocchi, but lighter - served with a butter and sage sauce, and hummingbird cake, an American sponge with pineapple, banana and cinnamon among its ingredients

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Popular chef Jamie Olivers latest menu features ham, egg and chips with a Jamaican jerk rub and caramelised pineapple, chicken kebab served with houmous and mango amba sauce, and a three-tiered chocolate sponge cake complete with nougat frosting

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: The chef shares her favourite recipes for effortless entertaining including chilli tortilla chips, slow roasted fillet of beef with basil and parmesan mayonnaise

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a birthday surprise for her friend, whipping up an Italian seafood salad and German chocolate cupcakes

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 10 remaining home-bakers must steel themselves to face the full force of Paul Hollywoods discerning eye as bread week arrives. For the signature bake, the contestants are given an hour-and-a-half to prepare quick breads with no proving - which results in creative flavours such as sweet chocolate loaves and manchego and prosciutto-stuffed bread coming to the fore. Next up is the technical challenge, in which Paul lulls the bakers into a false sense of security by asking them to make baguettes, a relatively simple task that concludes with the male judge delivering one of his most brutal verdicts yet. Finally, a bicycle, a snake, a lion and even Brighton Pavilion find their way into the tents ovens as the showstopper challenge sees the competitors crafting edible 3D bread sculptures

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins usher the nine remaining home-bakers back into the tent for the fourth week of the contest. This time, the competitors must tackle desserts, beginning with a signature challenge in the form of a French classic - creme brulees. With the clock ticking, the contestants must grill their offerings to perfection to avoid serving up an unappetising scrambled egg and custard soup. Next up is the technical challenge, in which Mary Berry asks the group to prepare Spanische Windtorte, an Austrian meringue inspired by the tastes of Spain, Switzerland and France. Finally, the showstopper this week involves baking a three-tiered cheesecake stack, and only the most structurally sound creations will be worthy of securing their maker the title of star baker

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The eight remaining home-bakers face a challenge of a different kind, as Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins reveal that the contestants must work their way through this weeks tasks using alternatives to commonly-used ingredients. programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide

It is claimed she choreographed the shootings of her second husbands parents, forged insurance documentation after their farm was burned down, fed her husbands grandparents arsenic and posed as a registered nurse for another couple, one of whom died in mysterious circumstances

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide

programme.title: Welcome to Killer Town

Thriller, starring Brian Cox, Noel Fisher, Tom Sizemore and Kyle Gallner

As Americas west coast comes under heavy attack, a platoon of soldiers is sent in to fight off the aliens and rescue civilians - but the troops have only a few hours to complete their mission before the area is bombed. Sci-fi thriller, with Aaron Eckhart and Ramon Rodriguez

programme.desc: An art professor who once worked as an assassin is blackmailed into returning to his old career to eliminate a spy. However, his target is in the middle of a mountaineering expedition, forcing the hitman to embark on a perilous climb up the Eiger in hot pursuit. Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With George Kennedy, Jack Cassidy and Vonetta McGee

programme.title: We Still Kill the Old Way (2014)
programme.desc: A former gangster returns to London after 30 years living in exile in Spain when he receives word of his brothers murder. Angered by the brutality of a new generation of criminals who have taken over his territory, he gets his old partners in crime back together to avenge his sibling and restore order to the streets. Gangster drama, starring Ian Ogilvy and Alison Doody

programme.title: Death Race 2000 (1975)
programme.desc: A totalitarian regime keeps the people of a dystopian future America placated with a violent spectacle - a cross country race requires contestants to run down innocent pedestrians, with points awarded for the most brutal kills. However, a revolutionary leader plans to sabotage the barbaric event by smuggling her daughter in as one of the navigators. Satirical sci-fi thriller, starring David Carradine, Sylvester Stallone and Simone Griffeth.

programme.desc: A series of environmental disasters leaves Earth almost entirely flooded, with the surviving humans crammed into overpopulated cities on the few remaining areas of land. Submarine crews embark on perilous missions to explore the underwater ruins of old cities in search of vital supplies to salvage. Sci-fi adventure, starring James Brolin and Ian Somerhalder

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: A mysterious library on a dying planet causes Kirk to become trapped in the past and branded a witch, while an accident lands Spock and McCoy in an icy predicament. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner

programme.desc: The Rangers investigate a series of accidents involving a Cherokee Indian racing team. Trent and Carlos save a young girl from a paedophile

programme.title: Bullet to Beijing (1995)
programme.desc: After the end of the Cold War, retired British spy Harry Palmer is working with ex-KGB operatives to prevent North Korea developing biological weapons, when he is called on to undertake a mission to recover a deadly man-made virus, which has been stolen from a Russian agent and is being transported to China by train. Thriller sequel, with Michael Caine reprising his role from The Ipcress File alongside Jason Connery, Mia Sara, Michael Gambon and Sue Lloyd

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder (1990)
programme.desc: A bomber pilot becomes disillusioned about the military hierarchy when one of his crew is killed on a mission. He finds an ally in a veteran bombardier and together they commandeer an aircraft and defy orders by launching an attack on an anti-aircraft missile site. Vietnam War adventure, starring Danny Glover, Willem Dafoe, Brad Johnson, Rosanna Arquette and Tom Sizemore

programme.desc: When he is imprisoned aboard a CIA submarine under mysterious circumstances, a deep cover operative joins forces with another prisoner to break free. Thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dolph Lundgren and Al Sapienza.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Medics at Kings College Hospital treat 79-year-old Arthur, who has been brought into resus with acute stomach discomfort and has several underlying conditions that could be to blame. Meanwhile, 20-year-old wine merchant Tom is rushed into AandE after collapsing with sharp chest pains and breathing difficulties, and retired soldier Rockey is concerned about his blurred vision

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance crews race to help a teenage motorcyclist who has been hit by a car and catapulted into the air - suffering multiple fractures to his legs and arms. On holiday in Cumbria, a man collapses while working out and his stepdaughter performs CPR to try to keep him alive. A driver suffers a nasty leg wound after being hit from behind on the M40 - and to make matters worse, he is trapped in his lorry

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Schizophrenic Graham, 75, is brought to Kings College Hospital after being stabbed in the neck by a stranger on his doorstep, and needs a CT scan to reveal the extent of his wound. Former nursery nurse Pat, 89, also arrives on the ward, having been found at the bottom of the stairs at home with no recollection of how she got there, while palliative care nurse Tracey treats 72-year-old retired postman Michael, who was recently diagnosed with lung cancer

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: On a busy Saturday night at Kings College Hospital, staff have to juggle the needs of elderly patients and sick children alongside those who are drunk or violent. Paramedics bring 12-year-old Grace into resus after she falls down a flight of stairs, while Sarah and Andy are concerned for their 10-month-old son Dexter, who has a high temperature and is unresponsive. Elsewhere, clinical site manager Gordon has a series of tests as a result of senior sister Jen noticing his bloodshot eye

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Midway through their North Yorkshire tour the campers visit Masons Campsite near Skipton for an exhilarating stay involving river swimming, trout fishing, cricket and croissants

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Douglas Hotel in Hartlepool, where owner Raqeeb Ramzan and his uncle Raj Malik hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Henry Cole and Simon OBrien meet Tamara, whose family have been farming there for nearly a century. Simon has ambitious plans to turn a pile of old slate into an unusual lamp, while Henry sets his heart on upcycling the seat from an old pony and trap

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies is on Spains Costa Del Sol, which as one of Europes top golfing destinations is popularly known as the Costa De Golf. House hunter Peggy is a massive fan of the game and cant think of anywhere else shed rather buy a holiday home, so shes counting on Danni to find her the perfect property. For her £115,000 budget, Danni tees up five options for Peggy to see along with her mother Coral, but will any score a hole in one?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: IT architect Anna hosts the first of a week of dinner parties from in and around Cardiff, hoping to impress her guests with a culinary journey celebrating classic British cooking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day two in Cardiff, accountant Charlotte is going all out to impress and has spent the cash on a menu of luxury ingredients in her bid to scoop the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beautician Claire hosts the third dinner party in Cardiff, but her decision to serve her favourite dishes on planks instead of plates proves controversial

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time football referee Scott serves up a menu of family favourites in Cardiff, but might have scored an own goal by putting cheese in every course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night in Cardiff sees restaurateur Giovanni cook a menu from his native Italy as he bids to wow guests Anna, Charlotte, Scott and Claire - and scoop the £1,000 prize. Giovanni knows his arch-rival Charlotte is looking for payback after he criticised her night earlier in the week, but when the others spy his massive and complex dishes, they wonder if hes tried too hard to impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Unicorn Inn in Ludlow, Shropshire, where husband and wife team Lee and Zoe Osbourne hope their glamorous fairy-tale style rooms will impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the East Walls Hotel in Chichester, West Sussex, owned by history-loving husband and wife Celia and Damon Haughey, who have rejected the boutique label

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Wheatsheaf in Sandbach, Cheshire, where owner Jake Pare and general manager Chris Baldwin hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Shawries Hotel in Blackpool, where fun-loving Allison and Dave Shaw want their guests to feel like part of the family. The dated decor takes Jake and Chris back to their childhood, but Celia and Damon arent fans of the 1980s look or the kiss-me-quick-style Blackpool break. Breakfast is a bargain build-your-own buttie platter, followed by feedback that leaves the competition wide open

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. East Walls Hotel is first up, and owners Celia and Damon need to clean up Daves toilet brush troubles before broaching his beef with the breakfast banger

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend take on their 100th motor - a 1978 MGB GT, their first electric conversion. The car used to belong to family man Jeff. When Jeff died, he left his unfinished MG project to his daughter Caroline, who promised her father she would complete the restoration. Can the team help Caroline fulfil her fathers dying wish?

A now-rare, British post-war classic has been handed down from father to son for 70 years. Current owner Richard has been unable to get the Riley up and running, so the boys try to make an automotive dream come true. But theres more to this restoration than meets the eye

Kirstie helps sewing blogger Elle and her fiance Ed, who have seen 52 properties and still cannot find the perfect pad. Phil helps Ben and Laura, who are relocating from Bristol. programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Nitasha and Nikunj in Staines-upon-Thames, who are unsure whether to sell their four-bed dormer bungalow or renovate instead. However, Nikunj feels like the work on the house will never be done, and would prefer to look for somewhere new

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The return of the programme that follows the work of Bedfordshire Police around-the-clock, with enquiries covered from the cells at Luton to the operational heart of major cases. The first edition goes behind the scenes of a major investigation into an allegation of police corruption, with the unprecedented access given by the police meaning that cameras are allowed to document all of the twists and turns of the case as detectives track down, arrest and then charge one of their fellow officers

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This edition sees staff at Kings College Hospital in south London treat patients involved in serious road accidents. Former soldier Steve, 48, was found unconscious at the wheel, 11-year-old schoolgirl Scarlett has been knocked down by a car, and Pauline, 70, was hit by a vehicle that mounted the pavement, seriously injuring her lower legs

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Young parents Nicole and Stefian arrive in resus with their 19-month-old daughter XahNae, who is unresponsive and has a high fever, and doctors fear she may have a life-threatening infection. Meanwhile, the team suspects 61-year-old Christine has suffered a second stroke in 10 years, and 52-year-old Graham, who has Downs syndrome, is brought into AandE by his sisters following an accident

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Maulden, Yvonne collapses with a cardiac arrest. Its a race against the clock as the heli-medics try to help. In the Peaks, medics land on top of a steep ridge to rescue Donna, who has collapsed while walking. A motorcyclist collides with a car trying to avoid ducks crossing the road and medics fear multiple fractures

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man involved in a car crash needs to be carefully removed from his vehicle to protect his spine, though a fuel leak means the fire service cannot risk cutting the roof off. A man with chest pains is worried hes having a heart attack, a 19-year-old falls down the stairs and suspects hes fractured his ankle, while an elderly mans vital signs are pointing towards one of the UKs biggest killers

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This edition sees staff at Kings College Hospital in south London treat patients involved in serious road accidents. Former soldier Steve, 48, was found unconscious at the wheel, 11-year-old schoolgirl Scarlett has been knocked down by a car, and Pauline, 70, was hit by a vehicle that mounted the pavement, seriously injuring her lower legs

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Sitting in the Yorkshire Dales National Park, the campers find themselves at The Dalesbridge where bad weather and a feathery fiasco cause tempers to fray. It remains to be seen whether the stunning scenery and live music will win over the campers as they reveal this weeks perfect pitch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet up for a final showdown, as Justin gives Tina and Kay a platform for their feedback about noisy trains and seeks to know more about Raqeebs problems with his shower. Tina and Kay want to clear up Raqeeb and Rajs cleanliness comments before discussing what really happened at breakfast. After dramatic discoveries and frank exchanges, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Pembrokeshire to meet a cattle breeder whose barns include a pair of discarded horns, and a camper van fan with a vintage pedal car

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a range of cases including a man who wraps his pick-up truck around a tree, a man who is having severe chest pain that could be a sign of a heart attack and a 103-year-old who has had a fall. Plus, a grandmother who may have a bleed on the brain and a mother with heart failure seek urgent medical treatment

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Schizophrenic Graham, 75, is brought to Kings College Hospital after being stabbed in the neck by a stranger on his doorstep, and needs a CT scan to reveal the extent of his wound. Former nursery nurse Pat, 89, also arrives on the ward, having been found at the bottom of the stairs at home with no recollection of how she got there, while palliative care nurse Tracey treats 72-year-old retired postman Michael, who was recently diagnosed with lung cancer

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: On a busy Saturday night at Kings College Hospital, staff have to juggle the needs of elderly patients and sick children alongside those who are drunk or violent. Paramedics bring 12-year-old Grace into resus after she falls down a flight of stairs, while Sarah and Andy are concerned for their 10-month-old son Dexter, who has a high temperature and is unresponsive. Elsewhere, clinical site manager Gordon has a series of tests as a result of senior sister Jen noticing his bloodshot eye

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Midway through their North Yorkshire tour the campers visit Masons Campsite near Skipton for an exhilarating stay involving river swimming, trout fishing, cricket and croissants

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Douglas Hotel in Hartlepool, where owner Raqeeb Ramzan and his uncle Raj Malik hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Henry Cole and Simon OBrien meet Tamara, whose family have been farming there for nearly a century. Simon has ambitious plans to turn a pile of old slate into an unusual lamp, while Henry sets his heart on upcycling the seat from an old pony and trap

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies is on Spains Costa Del Sol, which as one of Europes top golfing destinations is popularly known as the Costa De Golf. House hunter Peggy is a massive fan of the game and cant think of anywhere else shed rather buy a holiday home, so shes counting on Danni to find her the perfect property. For her £115,000 budget, Danni tees up five options for Peggy to see along with her mother Coral, but will any score a hole in one?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: IT architect Anna hosts the first of a week of dinner parties from in and around Cardiff, hoping to impress her guests with a culinary journey celebrating classic British cooking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day two in Cardiff, accountant Charlotte is going all out to impress and has spent the cash on a menu of luxury ingredients in her bid to scoop the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beautician Claire hosts the third dinner party in Cardiff, but her decision to serve her favourite dishes on planks instead of plates proves controversial

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time football referee Scott serves up a menu of family favourites in Cardiff, but might have scored an own goal by putting cheese in every course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night in Cardiff sees restaurateur Giovanni cook a menu from his native Italy as he bids to wow guests Anna, Charlotte, Scott and Claire - and scoop the £1,000 prize. Giovanni knows his arch-rival Charlotte is looking for payback after he criticised her night earlier in the week, but when the others spy his massive and complex dishes, they wonder if hes tried too hard to impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Unicorn Inn in Ludlow, Shropshire, where husband and wife team Lee and Zoe Osbourne hope their glamorous fairy-tale style rooms will impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the East Walls Hotel in Chichester, West Sussex, owned by history-loving husband and wife Celia and Damon Haughey, who have rejected the boutique label

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Wheatsheaf in Sandbach, Cheshire, where owner Jake Pare and general manager Chris Baldwin hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Shawries Hotel in Blackpool, where fun-loving Allison and Dave Shaw want their guests to feel like part of the family. The dated decor takes Jake and Chris back to their childhood, but Celia and Damon arent fans of the 1980s look or the kiss-me-quick-style Blackpool break. Breakfast is a bargain build-your-own buttie platter, followed by feedback that leaves the competition wide open

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. East Walls Hotel is first up, and owners Celia and Damon need to clean up Daves toilet brush troubles before broaching his beef with the breakfast banger

programme.desc: The story of a small colony founded on Roanoke island, off the eastern coast of North America, in 1587 - only for the settlers to disappear in mysterious circumstances

programme.title: Secret Nazi Science
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitlers reluctance to use chemical weapons, and how research into pesticide research created the poison gas used to kill millions in the Holocaust

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

However, when they arrive at the lock-up garage where it is kept, they find the vehicle has seen much better days, and is now little more than a well-preserved body shell with numerous mechanical parts missing

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: A crash in Norway leaves four dead and almost no wreckage to examine. However, investigators suspect a mysterious substance on the runway may have caused the disaster

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures

programme.sub-title: Florida Swamp Air Crash (Everglades Plane Crash)
programme.desc: The 1996 crash of ValuJet Flight 592 in the Florida Everglades, in which all 110 passengers and crew were killed. Investigators look into the cause of the tragedy

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to south Wales to pick up Adams 1984 Toyota FJ40 Land Cruiser, an Australian import four-by-four that went off road for all the wrong reasons and has been standing in a dusty garage, covered in junk. Its engine is leaking oil, there are problems with the front axle, and the bodywork is badly damaged. Unfortunately, parts for this desirable off-road vehicle prove to be as rare as hens teeth, leaving the team with a real headache

The trail takes Wilson across Russia and back to London, where he explores a story of intrigue surrounding Englands Queen Elizabeth I, uncovering clues along the way which lead to a final twist in the tale

programme.title: Secret History
programme.sub-title: China: Treasures of the Jade Empire
programme.desc: A look at the relics found in the tombs of Chinas Han Dynasty. The era is generally considered the golden age of ancient China, rivalling the Roman empire for international power, and has been a defining influence on the countrys cultural identity ever since. The programme examines how the emperors arranged to have their dead bodies mummified in the search for immortality and looks at a newly discovered version of the famous terracotta army
