programme.title: Who Killed Ivan the Terrible?
programme.desc: Criminologist David Wilson investigates the mysterious death of Russias first dictator, beginning by analysing rumours that the man who used terror to rule his huge empire may have been strangled by enemies in his court. The trail takes Wilson across Russia and back to London, where he explores a story of intrigue surrounding Englands Queen Elizabeth I, uncovering clues along the way which lead to a final twist in the tale

programme.title: Secret History
programme.sub-title: China: Treasures of the Jade Empire
programme.desc: A look at the relics found in the tombs of Chinas Han Dynasty. The era is generally considered the golden age of ancient China, rivalling the Roman empire for international power, and has been a defining influence on the countrys cultural identity ever since. The programme examines how the emperors arranged to have their dead bodies mummified in the search for immortality and looks at a newly discovered version of the famous terracotta army

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: A World Without War - May to December 1945
programme.desc: The final stages of the Second World War in the Far East as the Japanese rulers refused to concede defeat despite the agony of their people, culminating in the dropping of the atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki. With the conflict finally at an end, hundreds of thousands of servicemen were able to return home - where they had to learn to live without the structures of military life

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programme.desc: Eager collectors zoom in on a rare scientific showpiece. Plus, grieving sisters sell a Swiss clock that leaves the auction room in shock

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: An extraordinary search on behalf of Kate Brown from Portsmouth takes on twists and turns and unveils one missing relative after another. Kate Brown with a foster family and the closest thing she had to a blood relative was her foster brother John, who she was very close to, but while Kate was eventually adopted by the foster family, John was sent back to the care system. Ever since, Kate has been on a mission to find him, and during her research, she made an unexpected discovery

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present two heartbreaking stories of separation, including a man whose only memento of his birth mother and siblings is an old local newspaper article that shows them evicted from their home and squatting in an airfield. programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Roo Irvine and Mark Hill continue their Scottish jaunt as a 1970s Triumph transports the duo to shops scattered throughout the Highlands. A Georgian silver brooch gives veteran Tripper Roo something solemn to think about, but a rather unorthodox key rack, she hopes, will unlock some big profits. Meanwhile, rookie Tripper Mark continues to buy like an old hand as he finds a wooden sculpture of a naked torso that makes for an exhilarating auction

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Comedian and actress Emily Atack already knows she has showbusiness in her blood - her mother is singer and impressionist Kate Robbins, and Paul McCartney is her grandmothers cousin. Now she wants to learn more about her entertainment roots. Along the way she visits Liverpool to hear more about the McCartneys, and is also told tales of theatrical whistlers, Welsh footballers and Yorkshire miners. Anecdotes regarding struggles with mental health still resonate 130 years later. Narrated by Phil Davis

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Minnie Drivers parents were not married, but all the time they were together her father had a wife and another family. The actress didnt know this until she was older, and now she embarks on a quest to learn more about her dads background. She begins by discovering he was awarded a medal for his role in the Battle of Heligoland Bight during the Second World War - but why did he throw it away? Minnies trail to unravel the mystery leads her to relatives she never knew existed, as well as a kindred spirit

programme.desc: Eva shows how to turn ordinary evenings into something special, beginning with crispy Peking beef with noodles - a quick stir-fry thats crunchy and saucy. She also cooks chicken pad Thai, a vibrant, tangy noodle favourite, and spicy pork and tofu

programme.title: Nevens Ulster Food Tour
programme.desc: Neven Maguire visits Baronscourt Estate in Omagh, County Tyrone, a leading supplier of high-quality venison, and explores the estates approach to deer management and sustainable game meat production. In Derry, he checks into the Bishops Gate Hotel, learning about its history, and some of the notable people who have stayed there. Back home, Neven cooks crusted venison with creamed Cabbage, blackberry jus, and baby carrots

programme.title: Blue Lights

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Architect Hugh Wallace meets Kilkenny-based Trish Duffe, who is getting ready for the next chapter in her life. That means downsizing from her large four-bedroom home in Carlow to a smaller house in her home base of Kilkenny, closer to her elderly parents

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Joyce receives an unexpected visitor from her past, but tries to focus on taking care of a single mother pregnant with her second child, whose labour takes an unexpected turn. Rosalind oversees the care of a teenage mother and uncovers a disturbing truth

programme.title: Foxes: Their Secret World
programme.desc: Part two of two. Steve Backshall takes another look at fox behaviour, watching the seven cubs cameras have been following since they were days old as they battle to establish their hierarchy. programme.title: Kerry: Tides of Time
programme.desc: Part two of two. The story of a single year, as the seasons play out through and across the countys varied habitats. This programme looks in detail at the lives of some of the areas most charismatic and fascinating wild inhabitants. Badgers, red deer, hen harrier and puffins are among the cast of characters whose lives are followed through the year

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow (2004)
programme.desc: A climatologist warns global warming will soon result in destructive freak weather, or even another ice age. He thinks the world still has time to prepare for the worst, but the crisis happens almost immediately - and as storms, earthquakes and hurricanes strike in terrifying fashion, he races across America to rescue his son from a frozen New York. Disaster thriller, with Jake Gyllenhaal and Dennis Quaid

programme.title: Other Voices
programme.desc: The final episode of the series is devoted to the return of one of Irelands most resonant international voices, singer-songwriter Dermot Kennedy

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr embark on their first ever Spanish renovation job. Hoping to breathe new life into one of Andalusias forgotten villages, Amanda takes a gamble on a run-down three-storey townhouse and convinces Alan to help her to transform it into a boutique BandB. In a bid to push their DIY skills to a whole new level, the pair visit Granadas architectural marvel and the pinnacle of Moorish design - the Alhambra Palace. However, with over 2,000 square feet to contend with, a roof in need of repair and a crumbling outbuilding on its last legs, it seems they may be in over their heads

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr set about designing a Spanish dining room and foyer. Alans dreams of a lavish reception area are soon quashed when Amanda suggests his special space should be a cupboard under the stairs. To get some impressive design inspiration, the duo head to the outskirts of Vejer to a boutique hotel filled with local salvaged treasures. Amanda also visits the largest reclamation yard in Andalusia to upcycle an old Spanish door into a statement dining table, but Alan fears she may have taken her upcycling too far and is bluntly honest with his friend

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Long-running hospital drama set in a New Zealand accident and emergency ward, following the complicated personal and professional lives of its staff and their families and friends.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Levis protective over Abigail, Leah gives Holden a serve, and Lacey might be in danger

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Stacey Solomon and Liam Charles bring together the best teams from both sets of heats, whose first challenge is to create 24 classic chaussons aux pomme (apple turnovers) and come up with a new baked creation for the judges. For their second challenge they have five hours to produce a striking sugar showpiece on the theme of A Garden Paradise, along with two types of desserts of their choosing

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to West Sussex to meet with Olaf and Fritha who, in 2019, set out to build their own oasis on a piece of land that is boxed in by a railway line and an A-road. Due to an underground mains sewer, they were unable to build on half their plot and were left with a small triangle on which to build a three-bedroom house. They began with only £190,000 and were immediately surprised at the price of the sturdy retaining walls and foundations they needed to combat traffic vibrations and the sharp, pointed angles of the hand-built timber frame stretched Olaf to his limits. Kevin returns to see how life has gone for the pair and their new young daughter Lagertha in their triangular house

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: On Rachel and Pauls wedding anniversary the family rise to the occasion with an array of gifts including barbeques, an escape room experience and a Bulgarian smart speaker called Tim, but in order to get to the escape room they have to escape their own house first. Jim develops a rash on what hes choosing to call his upper thigh Comedy starring Jim Howick and Katherine Parkinson

programme.title: First Dates Ireland
programme.desc: After more than a decade documenting every moment of her life, busy social media star Cloda from Tipperary is keen to ditch the apps and meet someone in the wild, but will Mons from Waterford be the one? Moonbathing energy healer Elaine from Tallaght claims to be able to speak with little spirits that wake her in the night to crack jokes and, as a dad of two, actor Darren from Donabate can relate, while creche worker Sarah from Wicklow finds common ground with agricultural science student Peter from Donegal

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Erin is over the moon when she manages to secure herself the editorship of the school magazine, The Habit. Especially when she uncovers an explosive story. Orla become obsessed by step aerobics, Da Gerry gets into trouble with Ma Mary and love is in the air for Aunt Sarah. Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Louisa Harland, Tommy Tiernan, Tara Lynne ONeill and Kathy Kiera Clarke

programme.title: Hell for Leather: The Story of Gaelic Football
programme.desc: Mick OConnell discusses his own legacy and the future of Gaelic football. The documentary also explores Mick ODwyers moves towards unprecedented success, the re-emergence of the sleeping giants of Mayo and the appearance of women on the frontline in the 1970s

programme.title: Rising Tides: Irelands Future in a Warmer World

He explores how we can adapt to new wildfire seasons, learning from the experts in Spain. Philip also travels to The Netherlands, and learns how to build world class coastal defences to combat the rising seas

programme.desc: Two destitute brothers stand to make a fortune by auctioning off the family home, but before the sale can be finalised they face the task of evicting its resident mouse. For their second challenge they have five hours to produce a striking sugar showpiece on the theme of A Garden Paradise, along with two types of desserts of their choosing

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to West Sussex to meet with Olaf and Fritha who, in 2019, set out to build their own oasis on a piece of land that is boxed in by a railway line and an A-road. Due to an underground mains sewer, they were unable to build on half their plot and were left with a small triangle on which to build a three-bedroom house. They began with only £190,000 and were immediately surprised at the price of the sturdy retaining walls and foundations they needed to combat traffic vibrations and the sharp, pointed angles of the hand-built timber frame stretched Olaf to his limits. Kevin returns to see how life has gone for the pair and their new young daughter Lagertha in their triangular house

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: On Rachel and Pauls wedding anniversary the family rise to the occasion with an array of gifts including barbeques, an escape room experience and a Bulgarian smart speaker called Tim, but in order to get to the escape room they have to escape their own house first. Jim develops a rash on what hes choosing to call his upper thigh Comedy starring Jim Howick and Katherine Parkinson

programme.title: First Dates Ireland

Moonbathing energy healer Elaine from Tallaght claims to be able to speak with little spirits that wake her in the night to crack jokes and, as a dad of two, actor Darren from Donabate can relate, while creche worker Sarah from Wicklow finds common ground with agricultural science student Peter from Donegal

programme.title: Derry Girls

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: When veteran detective Danny Frater turns up at a hospital mortuary for what he thinks is a routine ID check, he gets a devastating shock. The deceased - a young woman - turns out to be his estranged daughter, Christina. According to the post-mortem report, shes taken her own life. Although the pathologist, Jackie Sowden, insists that the evidence points overwhelmingly toward suicide, Danny refuses to accept her findings, and he forces Jackie to take him through her examination step-by-step. Psychological crime thriller, starring James Nesbitt, Richard E Grant, Ben Miller, Joely Richardson, Anne-Marie Duff, and Niamh Algar

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: Detective Danny Frater arrives at the apartment where his estranged daughter Christinas body was found, and manages to get inside. As he carries out a search, he is startled to discover a young woman hiding in the bedroom. Although she does her best to escape, Danny manages to prevent her and forces her to answer his questions. She turns out to be Christinas wife, Nicola, and their subsequent conversation reveals as much about Dannys estrangement from his daughter as it does Christinas increasingly dark and complicated life

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Ahead of the final board meeting on the Waystar-Gojo deal, Kendall and Shiv try to shore up their opposing interests and get a fix on the whereabouts of a physically and emotionally bruised Roman. The final episode of the drama, starring Jeremy Strong, Sarah Snook and Kieran Culkin

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Teenager Logan starts work as an apprentice deck-hand, while landlady Pat recalls fond memories from her life in Brixham

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Fish merchant Robert and his wife Kelly decide to open a seafood restaurant in Brixham - but their determinedly contemporary approach to cuisine leaves some locals unimpressed. The programme also follows the journey of a turbot over 36 hours, as it is caught and auctioned off before being served in an exclusive London restaurant

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capitals love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the citys first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the town of Ennis, Alaska, the eight men working at the Tsalal Arctic Research Station all disappear. Local police chief Liz Danvers leads the investigation, but state trooper Evangeline Navarro believes it may be linked to an unsolved murder. The return of the crime anthology, starring Jodie Foster and Kali Reis

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal - and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence - Captain Connelly threatens to hand the case over to Anchorage. Later, Navarro and Danvers separately find a connection between one of the Tsalal men and Annie, prompting the former partners to agree to work the case together

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Hank leads the search for Clark, Prior asks Danvers about the murder-suicide case that drove a wedge between her and Navarro. After sifting through the contents of Clarks trailer, Navarro and Danvers seek out a local hairdresser for insight on Annie, which leads to a tip about another former Tsalal worker. Later, tensions grow between Danvers and her stepdaughter Leah

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: When Julias mental-health struggles resurface, Navarro takes her to a local facility, promising that this time will be better. Later, Danvers and Navarro confirm the location of Annies murder, while the police chief levies a harsh punishment on Leah following her stepdaughters act of protest

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Prior digs into the links between Tsalal and mining company Silver Sky, Navarro rescues Leah from a local protest that has turned violent. At a meeting with Silver Sky executve Kate McKitterick, Danvers balks when Connelly shares the official cause of the Tsalal mens deaths - and gets a warning against pursuing the case any further. Later, Hank receives a quid pro quo offer

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the midst of a brutal storm, Danvers and Navarro find themselves stuck at Tsalal with no electricity or means of contact. As the truth about what happened to Annie and the Tsalal men unfolds, Navarro and Danvers each confront the demons from their past.

programme.title: Hacks

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: With her prime performance slots hanging in the balance, Deborah reluctantly begins working with Ava, testing their initial compatibility with a highly unconventional road trip. programme.desc: The duo visit Bolton Abbey and eat breakfast at the Angel Inn at Hetton in North Yorkshire. On the journey back to London from their culinary tour of the north of England, they stop off at Steves parents house. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson

programme.title: Bookworm (2024)
programme.desc: Mildred, an 11-year-old girl, finds her world turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, takes her on a wild adventure. Family comedy, starring Elijah Wood and Nell Fisher

programme.title: Super Charlie (2024)
programme.desc: Willies dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives. And the new family member turns out to have superpowers. Family animation, with the voices of Karen Ardiff and Alex Kelly

programme.title: Trolls (2016)
programme.desc: A tribe of perpetually happy fuzzy-headed creatures are kidnapped by a race of giants who intend to eat them. The princess of the clan escapes and plans a rescue mission - but to save her friends, she will need the help of a grumpy troll with a loathing of music who has rejected their joyful culture to live as a loner. Animated musical, with the voices of Anna Kendrick and Justin Timberlake

programme.title: Shrek 2 (2004)
programme.desc: The grouchy ogre and his new wife Princess Fiona set out on a journey to meet her parents. However, the king and queen are less than impressed with their daughters choice of husband, while a conniving fairy godmother is determined to make sure her own son gets to marry the princess. Animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas, John Cleese, Julie Andrews, Jennifer Saunders and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potters stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: The LEGO Movie (2014)
programme.desc: An ordinary man leading a life of blissful ignorance in a city made of the construction toy is mistakenly identified as a chosen one destined to save the universe. He joins a mismatched band of heroes in stopping a plan to fix the world permanently in place. Animated comedy, with the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks, Morgan Freeman and Will Ferrell

programme.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
programme.desc: Five years after events of the first film, teenager Finn has rebuilt Bricksburg into a post-apocalyptic wasteland. When Emmet is plagued by a vision of an impending cataclysm, he and Lucy fight to protect their beloved city from invaders. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks and Will Arnett

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021)
programme.desc: With the web-slingers identity now revealed to the world, Peter Parker asks Doctor Strange for magical help to undo the damage. However, a spell gone wrong unleashes dangerous foes from parallel universes on the world. Comic-book adventure sequel, starring Tom Holland, Zendaya and Benedict Cumberbatch, with Willem Dafoe, Jamie Foxx and Alfred Molina among the stars of past Spider-Man movies reprising their roles

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3 (2024)
programme.desc: The blue hedgehog, Knuckles and Tails reunite to face the might of the villainous Shadow, who possesses powers unlike anything they have seen before. Outmuscled on every front, Sonic seeks help from an unlikely source, Dr Ivo Robotnik. Fantasy adventure sequel based on the videogame, starring Jim Carrey, James Marsden and Tika Sumpter

programme.title: Pacific Rim (2013)
programme.desc: A rift between dimensions opens up at the bottom of the Pacific ocean, and Earth is invaded by gigantic alien monsters. Equally massive robots, each controlled by two human pilots with their minds linked, are created to fight back against the creatures. Sci-fi adventure, starring Charlie Hunnam, Rinko Kikuchi and Idris Elba

programme.title: Trolls (2016)
programme.desc: A tribe of perpetually happy fuzzy-headed creatures are kidnapped by a race of giants who intend to eat them. The princess of the clan escapes and plans a rescue mission - but to save her friends, she will need the help of a grumpy troll with a loathing of music who has rejected their joyful culture to live as a loner. Animated musical, with the voices of Anna Kendrick and Justin Timberlake

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potters stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse (2018)
programme.desc: After being bitten by a radioactive arachnid, student Miles Morales develops incredible abilities, and becomes a version of Spider-Man. When a super collider device opens a gateway to other dimensions, Miles crosses paths with five counterparts to stop a threat for all realities. Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Shameik Moore and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
programme.desc: Five years after events of the first film, teenager Finn has rebuilt Bricksburg into a post-apocalyptic wasteland. When Emmet is plagued by a vision of an impending cataclysm, he and Lucy fight to protect their beloved city from invaders. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks and Will Arnett

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyongo, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: A reporter discovers four humanoid amphibians who live in the sewers of New York, and use their martial arts skills to fight crime. She helps them as they face their toughest challenge yet - defeating a sinister criminal organisation that seems to have power over the entire city. Fantasy adventure, starring Megan Fox and William Fichtner, with the voice of Johnny Knoxville

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahls book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Man Finds Tape (2025)
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.title: Paddington in Peru (2024)
programme.desc: The lovable bear, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his Aunt Lucy, embarking on a mysterious adventure. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Emily Mortimer, Antonio Banderas, Olivia Colman and Julie Walters, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons Oscar-winning action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, an Academy Award-winning Sean Penn, and Benicio del Toro

programme.desc: A profile of Edmund Kemper, also known as the Co-ed Butcher, the American serial killer whose spate of killings lasted from 1964 to 1973

This documentary tells the story of the Home Counties mother of two who became one of Britains most notorious killers

programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs ultimate invention - the colony. programme.title: Africas Wild Year
programme.desc: A four-part journey through Africa to experience the seasons that shape the continent. Spring in southern Africa brings long days and high temperatures, as the natural world flurries into life, transforming the continent on land and in the cold waters of the rugged coastlines. Before long, animals and plants make an an effort to reproduce and raise their young before summer dries out the lakes and rivers and takes its uncompromising hold on the planes

programme.title: Attenboroughs Journey
programme.desc: Documentary following David Attenborough as he journeys around the world to make his series First Life, which explores the origins of life on Earth. As he visits locations including the Great Barrier Reef, the deserts of Morocco and the glaciers of Canada, the broadcaster and wildlife expert explains his life-long fascination with the natural world, and also travels back to Leicestershire, the county in which he spent his childhood

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School

programme.title: Into the Wild: India

programme.title: Superbad (2007)
programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill, Michael Cera and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: Fools Rush In (1997)
programme.desc: An American architect agrees to marry a Mexican photographer after she falls pregnant after their ill-advised one-night stand. However, they quickly discover the pitfalls of their decision as cultures clash and sparks begin to fly. Romantic comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Salma Hayek, Jon Tenney and Carlos Gomez

programme.title: Billy Madison (1995)
programme.desc: A lazy twentysomething lives off his wealthy hotel magnate father. When the old man decides to retire, he begins to question whether his layabout son is suitable to take over the family empire and issues a challenge - he must retake 12 years of school in 24 weeks, or lose everything. Comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Bridgette Wilson, Darren McGavin and Bradley Whitford.

programme.title: Ferris Buellers Day Off (1986)
programme.desc: A teenager plays truant from school and spends the day dragging his girlfriend and a reluctant friend into all manner of crazy adventures in the big city - while the schools dean of students vows to stop at nothing to prove the youngster is faking illness. Comedy, starring Matthew Broderick, Mia Sara, Alan Ruck, Jennifer Grey, Jeffrey Jones and Charlie Sheen

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie (1995)
programme.desc: It is now the 1990s and the members of the sweet, all-American family face a testing time as their brash neighbours scheme to tear down the Brady home to make way for a shopping centre. Comedy, based on the 1970s TV sitcom, starring Shelley Long, Gary Cole, Christine Taylor and Christopher Daniel Barnes

programme.title: Paddington in Peru (2024)
programme.desc: The lovable bear, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his Aunt Lucy, embarking on a mysterious adventure. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Emily Mortimer, Antonio Banderas, Olivia Colman and Julie Walters, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective (1994)
programme.desc: An eccentric but brilliant former cop sets himself up to champion the underdog - as a private eye specialising in locating missing animals. The zany detective is called in to find a kidnapped dolphin - the mascot of an American football team - and uncovers a plot involving high-level police corruption. Comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Courteney Cox, Sean Young, Tone Loc and Noble Willingham

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls (1995)
programme.desc: The eccentric pet detective is coaxed out of self-imposed exile in a Buddhist monastery to visit Africa and help search for a sacred white bat. However, his unique investigative talents are tested to the limits as he faces a race against time to find the missing creature and prevent a tribal war. Comedy sequel, starring Jim Carrey, Simon Callow and Bob Gunton

programme.title: American Pie (1999)
programme.desc: Four teenage lads make a solemn pact to lose their virginity before the high-school prom. Though their antics cause them huge embarrassment and public humiliation, the friends also learn about love and affection in their relations with the opposite sex. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Jason Biggs, Shannon Elizabeth, Chris Klein, Alyson Hannigan, Mena Suvari, Seann William Scott and Eugene Levy

programme.title: American Pie 2 (2001)
programme.desc: The teenagers reunite after their first year at college to spend the summer at a lake house. Jim is concerned by his lack of sexual experience, and goes in search of an old flame, Oz struggles to keep a long-term relationship going, and Finch tries to master the art of tantric sex. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Biggs, Chris Klein, Seann William Scott, Alyson Hannigan and Eugene Levy

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding (2003)
programme.desc: The friends from East Great Falls High reunite to celebrate Jim and Michelles forthcoming wedding. Though reluctant to invite Stifler to their big day, the happy couple relent - but regret their decision when he plans a bachelor party on the same evening Jim is due to meet the in-laws. The third instalment in the comedy series, with Jason Biggs, Alyson Hannigan, Seann William Scott, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Eugene Levy

programme.title: American Reunion (2012)
programme.desc: Jim Levenstein and his old friends return to their home town for a high-school reunion. Struck by how much their lives have changed, they set out to relive the sexual misadventures of their adolescence, but only end up making bigger fools of themselves than they did as teenagers. Comedy sequel to the American Pie movies, starring Jason Biggs and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls (1995)
programme.desc: The eccentric pet detective is coaxed out of self-imposed exile in a Buddhist monastery to visit Africa and help search for a sacred white bat. programme.title: The Cable Guy (1996)
programme.desc: A man makes the mistake of engaging a cable TV installer in conversation in a ploy to get all the channels for free. However, the manic repairman shows an invincible determination to be his new best friend - and does not take kindly to rejection. Comedy directed by Ben Stiller, starring Jim Carrey, Matthew Broderick and George Segal

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing (2002)
programme.desc: A woman more interested in one-night stands than true love is forced to reassess her priorities after meeting the man of her dreams. However, when she hears he is getting married, she sets out on a hectic road trip across America to stop the wedding. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Christina Applegate, Selma Blair and Thomas Jane

The third instalment in the comedy series, with Jason Biggs, Alyson Hannigan, Seann William Scott, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Eugene Levy

Comedy sequel to the American Pie movies, starring Jason Biggs and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Mean Girls (2004)
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rivals crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lindsay Lohan, Rachel McAdams, Tina Fey and Lacey Chabert

programme.title: Panda Plan (2024)
programme.desc: An international action superstar gets involved in a rescue operation of a beloved zoo panda named Hu Hu. Chinese comedy, starring Jackie Chan and Xiang Wei, with subtitles

programme.title: Liar Liar (1997)
programme.desc: A lawyer whose underhand ploys to win cases leave him little time to see his son discovers he is incapable of lying after the boys birthday wish makes his dad tell only the truth. However, this causes a host of problems as the attorney tries to muddle his way through a high-profile divorce settlement. Comedy, with Jim Carrey, Maura Tierney, Justin Cooper, Jennifer Tilly and Cary Elwes

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part III (2013)
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alans brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman

programme.title: The Cable Guy (1996)
programme.desc: A man makes the mistake of engaging a cable TV installer in conversation in a ploy to get all the channels for free. However, the manic repairman shows an invincible determination to be his new best friend - and does not take kindly to rejection. Comedy directed by Ben Stiller, starring Jim Carrey, Matthew Broderick and George Segal

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing (2002)
programme.desc: A woman more interested in one-night stands than true love is forced to reassess her priorities after meeting the man of her dreams. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Christina Applegate, Selma Blair and Thomas Jane

However, this causes a host of problems as the attorney tries to muddle his way through a high-profile divorce settlement. programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad! (1988)
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a colleague, disaster-prone police lieutenant Frank Drebin uncovers a plot to assassinate the Queen during her visit to Los Angeles. However, after he is sacked from the force by the mayor, the cop has to operate beneath the radar to get to the bottom of the conspiracy. Comedy, with Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley and Ricardo Montalban

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear (1991)
programme.desc: Blundering cop Frank Drebin discovers a secret conspiracy to kidnap a renowned solar energy expert and replace him with an imposter. As he sets out to bring the perpetrators to justice, he is unexpectedly reunited with an old flame. Slapstick comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, George Kennedy, Richard Griffiths and OJ Simpson.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult (1994)
programme.desc: Inept police detective Frank Drebin plans to retire from the force, but is lured back by the opportunity to foil a terrorist plot. Going undercover in prison, he sets out to prevent an evil mastermind from escaping and carrying out his fiendish plan - to bomb the Oscar awards ceremony. Comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, OJ Simpson, George Kennedy and Fred Ward

programme.title: Paddington (2014)
programme.desc: An earthquake forces a bear from the Peruvian jungle to start a new life in London. He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bonds series of childrens books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: After being saved from Warehouse 2 by Artie, Pete and Myka leave Egypt to find out which artefact HG Wells was searching for - and uncover a chilling plan. Sci-fi drama, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Pete, Myka and HG fly out to Egypt to shut down Warehouse 2, which has become active - and put the life of Mrs Frederic in danger. Drama, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Return of the post-apocalyptic drama, starring Andrew Lincoln. After escaping from the Centre for Disease Control only seconds before it self-destructs, Rick and the group head for a military base, but find themselves fighting off a horde of zombies. When the dust settles, Sophia is nowhere to be seen, and the search for her leads to disaster for Ricks son Carl

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: The chef celebrates British food, examining the stories behind the nations best-loved dishes and meeting people involved in providing the ingredients for them, He begins in the Lake District, enjoying a traditional mutton hotpot with sheep farmer and author James Rebank, then braves Morecambe Bays treacherous mud flats to meet a shrimp fisherman. Back home in Padstow, Rick is joined by his son Jack to cook his mums shepherds pie

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes

programme.title: Hello Campers

In the first episode, he meets a group of families whove taken their annual break at the same place in Norfolk for more than 30 years, and tries his hand at a traditional sport _ welly-wanging

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: This edition charts the exploits of Pat and Sue Willan, who now retired plan to buy their very last floating home, which they hope to keep moored on the Thames. They have enlisted the help of a boat-maker in Stoke and opted for a 35-tonne, 55-foot state-of-the-art, all-mod-cons Dutch barge. They have a healthy budget of over £400,000 and elaborate plans for very contemporary kitchen fittings and gadgets and a powerful hydraulic engine

programme.title: Love Your Home and Garden
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Alan Titchmarsh and his team transform a home and garden in Chester for retired couple Richard and Ann Price. Alan and the team re-configure the house and create a direct connection to a new country-style outdoor space

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Documentary following life at Highclere Castle, best known to Downton Abbey fans as the setting for the popular period drama, following Lord and Lady Carnarvon and their loyal staff as they strive to make this year the most profitable to date, with a busy calendar of events both home and away. Lady Carnarvon becomes an unexpected tour guide for some Americans whove turned up expecting a private tour of the famous castle. Head butler Luis mans the drinks and ice-cream kiosk on one of the hottest days of spring, while head of visitor reception Paul prepares to display a precious family heirloom - a vintage 1936 Rolls-Royce

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill are in Ledbury to design an Italian courtyard garden that reminds Miranda and Andrew of their 25th wedding anniversary in Tuscany

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Garden makeover show, with Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull. In Port Sunlight, the Wirral, they turn Emma and Nathans scruffy cottage garden into a Balinese paradise. Having spent the pandemic indoors, they would love an outdoor escape - a tropical oasis, complete with lush planting and water feature

programme.title: Can You Keep it Up for a Week? (1974)
programme.desc: A workshy mans fiancee challenges him to hold down a steady job - a situation that puts him squarely in the path of temptation. Comedy, starring Richard OSullivan, Jeremy Bulloch, Neil Hallett and Jill Damas

programme.title: Permissive (1970)
programme.desc: A woman comes to London to visit an old friend, and gets drawn into the world of rock band groupies. She quickly sinks into a self-destructive hedonistic lifestyle, and is consumed with jealousy as she and rival groupies bitterly compete to outshine each other in the eyes of the musicians they cling to. Drama, starring Maggie Stride and Gay Singleton

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for a piece of a Formula 1 car driven by Ayrton Senna, a gold and platinum-plated Toyota Supra engine and a poster and ticket from a Sex Pistols tour that never happened. An ornate brass palm-tree light from the 1970s also goes up for sale

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Documentary following life at Highclere Castle, best known to Downton Abbey fans as the setting for the popular period drama, following Lord and Lady Carnarvon and their loyal staff as they strive to make this year the most profitable to date, with a busy calendar of events both home and away. Lady Carnarvon becomes an unexpected tour guide for some Americans whove turned up expecting a private tour of the famous castle. Head butler Luis mans the drinks and ice-cream kiosk on one of the hottest days of spring, while head of visitor reception Paul prepares to display a precious family heirloom - a vintage 1936 Rolls-Royce

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Lee Burkhill and Flo Headlam design an Asian-inspired garden in Fleet with lots of colourful plants and a nod to the tropical gardens of the owners Taiwanese heritage

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Garden makeover show, with Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull. In Port Sunlight, the Wirral, they turn Emma and Nathans scruffy cottage garden into a Balinese paradise. Having spent the pandemic indoors, they would love an outdoor escape - a tropical oasis, complete with lush planting and water feature

programme.title: Love Your Home and Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and a team of architects, builders and gardeners transform the kitchen and garden of wheelchair-bound 15-year-old Josh, who has multiple disabilities. The kitchen is so tiny that Josh and his mum Benita cannot be in it together, and Joshs wheelchair wont fit through the back door so the garden is completely off-limits. Architects Ewald and George create a new layout in the house so Josh can move from the front door to the back garden with ease, and task builder Kunle turns the kitchen into a state-of-the-art conservatory so mother and son can cook together for the first time. In the garden, Alan creates a series of different rooms, each designed to appeal to different senses

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Rick rediscovers his love for Argyll and Bute, meeting chef Pamela Brunton, whose menu exhibits local and foraged ingredients. He catches langoustine with teacher-turned-fisherwoman Mary Galloway, explores a century-old smokehouse, and at home he cooks arroz rojo and tattie scones with Scottish smoked salmon

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson is joined by fellow actor Mark Benton to explore the Cleveland and North Yorkshire coast while sampling outdoor activities that promise to be good for the mind and body. Their road trip takes in the world-famous cliff lift in the Victorian seaside resort of Saltburn-by-the-Sea, a night in a real-life Hobbit hole, drawing lesson in the fishing port of Staithes and a bracing cold water swim in the Tees

programme.title: My Greek Kitchen
programme.desc: Part one of two. Tonia Buxton travels to Paradise Beach on Mykonos, where she rustles up red mullet parcels and traditional Greek dessert baklava

programme.title: Richard Wilsons Highland Fling
programme.desc: The actor explores the Highlands and islands of his native Scotland in grand style, from travelling by rail on the Belmond Royal Scotsman to cruising on the Hebridean Princess

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: South African-born Linda, her husband Mark and Coco the cat share a one-bedroom floating home on Taggs Island in Hampton, Surrey. Its an idyllic location, but their home is also their workplace and its starting to feel a bit cramped. The couple want to stay put in their exclusive location, so Linda has hatched an ambitious plan to buy the boat next door and do it up all by herself. Its a huge challenge and it remains to be seen whether enthusiasm and passion will be enough to get the job done

programme.title: Love Your Home and Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and a team of architects, builders and gardeners transform the kitchen and garden of wheelchair-bound 15-year-old Josh, who has multiple disabilities. The kitchen is so tiny that Josh and his mum Benita cannot be in it together, and Joshs wheelchair wont fit through the back door so the garden is completely off-limits. Architects Ewald and George create a new layout in the house so Josh can move from the front door to the back garden with ease, and task builder Kunle turns the kitchen into a state-of-the-art conservatory so mother and son can cook together for the first time. In the garden, Alan creates a series of different rooms, each designed to appeal to different senses

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The castle manager John and his team are awake before sunrise to welcome the crew of the ITV show Lorraine, who are broadcasting live from the castles famous grand saloon to mark the release of the second Downton Abbey movie. Unfortunately, the shows visit coincides with the busiest day of the year for coach parties and its a race against the clock to get the crew out before the first bus load arrives

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Lee Burkhill and Flo Headlam design an Asian-inspired garden in Fleet with lots of colourful plants and a nod to the tropical gardens of the owners Taiwanese heritage

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: In Cwmbran, south Wales, Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill are tasked with creating a relaxed, free-flowing garden with a seating area and a way to attract wildlife for retired archaeologist Jane on a budget of £6,000

programme.title: Adventures of a Private Eye (1977)
programme.desc: A detectives search for a blackmailer is hampered by a succession of voluptuous women who cannot seem to resist his manly charms. Sex comedy, starring Christopher Neil, Suzy Kendall, Harry H Corbett, Irene Handl and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Mary Millington: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair (1979)
programme.desc: A seductive astrologers carefree life is brought crashing to a halt when he is accused of robbery and cannot win over the only person able to provide an alibi. He faces a possibly greater challenge in providing a woman who has never had an orgasm with the satisfaction she has long been deprived of. Sex comedy, starring Alan Lake and Diana Dors

programme.title: The Train at Platform 5
programme.desc: The social history of Kings Cross rail workers with stories from coal-shovelling firemen on 1950s steam trains to Wilston Jackson, the UKs first Black train driver

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chefs gastronomic road trip from Venice to Istanbul through the countries of the former Byzantine Empire is nearing its end as he leaves southern Greece for the shores of western Turkey. On the Cesme Peninsula Rick enjoys creamy Armola cheese matured in goat skins, Urlas famous red wine and the ultimate Turkish breakfast. He also cooks the countrys iconic dish sultans delight - a mouth-watering lamb stew on a bed of aubergine puree

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: 120 kilograms of cocaine are discovered in the axles of a lowboy trailer, and two men are caught attempting to smuggle a rooster for cock-fighting

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Packages of cocaine are found concealed in the chassis of a bus, officers receive a tip-off about a vehicle loaded with cartel cash, and a magician comes under scrutiny

programme.title: How Britain Worked
programme.desc: Guy Martin works on a machine that can be credited with helping to kick-start the Industrial Revolution. Joining a team from the Black Country Living Museum, he helps to restore a Newcomen engine - an 18th-century steam-powered device used principally to pump water out of mines. As the rotting timber structure is replaced, worn parts repaired, the boiler cleaned and crumbling brickwork rebuilt, the presenter also learns about the lives of the men, women and children who mined coal

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May set out to discover if they can go motor racing for less than it costs to play golf. Theres also a double helping of guests, with rock star Slash and former Formula One driver Kimi Raikkonen taking to the track in Reasonably Priced Cars. Richard also gets behind the wheel of the BMW M5, which is powered by a twin-turbo V8 engine instead of the high-revving V10 of its predecessor

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson attempts to build a car that is even smaller than the Peel P50 and then tests it out on the streets of London before pitching his concept in the Dragons Den. programme.desc: An eclectic mix of five celebrities go out for dinner together. When they arrive at the restaurant, they must place their bank card in the centre of the table. The person whose card remains at the end of the evening must pick up the bill for the whole group. programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: The construction of a 130-tonne locomotive in Newcastle is nearing the finish line, and an overnight crew must get a Brisbane train on track before the morning commute

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chefs gastronomic road trip reaches a conclusion as he arrives in Istanbul, just in time for the bluefish season, which allows him the chance to enjoy a fishing expedition on the Bosphorus, one of the worlds most strategic waterways, which divides the city into two continents. Rick also cooks two much-loved local dishes - lavish kofte kebabs with pistachios, and kapuska, a hearty traditional Turkish cuisine stew from the Black Sea region, whose name is derived from the Russian word for cabbage

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A shipment of cocaine is discovered in the fifth wheel of a tractor-trailer, and officers searching a courier van find a cache of firearms

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: More stories from the documentary series that looks at the 28 bridges that cross the notorious Rio Grande, between Texas and Mexico, and provide a gateway for legitimate goods and a lucrative pipeline for illegal contraband, weapons and drugs. Officers in Eagle Pass seize over 15 kilograms of heroin and unveil a new cartel drug-smuggling tactic, and a Mexican family in Laredo makes a plea for humanitarian parole

programme.title: How Britain Worked
programme.desc: Guy Martin helps with the £500,000 restoration of the oldest surviving Brixham sailing trawler, a vessel that launched the modern fishing industry and transformed the way a nation ate. Guy learns about the boats design, tests his own version of an Industrial Revolution life jacket, and makes rope using the original machines used for Nelsons HMS Victory. He also experiences deep-sea trawling and discovers how Britain acquired its taste for fish and chips

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The trio of motoring enthusiasts embark on another epic road trip, this time across western America in front-engined supercars. Jeremy Clarkson pilots the Lexus LFA, which has a spectacularly high-revving V10 powerplant, Richard Hammond gets behind the wheel of the muscular Dodge Viper, and James May opts for a recent incarnation of Aston Martins Vanquish. On their journey from Las Vegas to Palm Springs via Los Angeles, the presenters tackle racing circuits and find themselves in a race against the police, before rushing to the Mexican border - and theres a terrifying penalty for the last man to arrive. Meanwhile, Fleetwood Mac drummer Mick Fleetwood rolls up his sleeves to thrash the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on a race from Londons Wembley Stadium to Milans San Siro, the home of Italian football giants AC and Inter. A price restriction leads Jeremy to grab the keys to a Shelby Mustang GT500, which costs the equivalent of £35,000 in America and packs a supercharged punch of more than 650bhp. James and Richard pin their hopes on the pan-European rail network in a bid to secure the prize of tickets to a top-flight football match, with nothing but a long journey home awaiting the losers. On the test track, Jeremy puts Toyotas GT86 coupe through its paces, and its promise of entertaining rear-wheel-drive handling should put a smile on his face. Plus, singer-songwriter Amy Macdonald gets to grips with the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team sets off on a high-altitude trek from Kathmandu, capital of Nepal, to the Forbidden City of Lo Manthang, a secretive kingdom perched high on the Tibetan plateau, on the far side of the Himalayas. On a five-day expedition through the highest mountains, deepest gorges and harshest terrain on the planet, Paddy McGuinness, Freddie Flintoff and Chris Harris battle huge river crossings, vast mudslides and dizzying mountain passes on a trip that would test even the hardiest new 4x4s to the limit. But Paddy, Freddie and Chris arent crossing the Himalayas in new 4x4s. Theyre crossing the Himalayas in a small old Peugeot, a very compact old Renault, and Nepals first (and only) home-built car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are sent to Bolivia, where they are challenged to travel through the rainforest and journey to the coast of Chile, driving second-hand off-road vehicles bought locally for a maximum of £3,500 each. Along the way, they encounter drug lords and feel the effects of altitude sickness as they negotiate the regions roads, one of which is a notoriously dangerous 40-mile mountain pass dubbed El Camino de la Muerte - the Death Road

programme.title: How Britain Worked
programme.desc: Guy Martin works on a machine that can be credited with helping to kick-start the Industrial Revolution. Joining a team from the Black Country Living Museum, he helps to restore a Newcomen engine - an 18th-century steam-powered device used principally to pump water out of mines. As the rotting timber structure is replaced, worn parts repaired, the boiler cleaned and crumbling brickwork rebuilt, the presenter also learns about the lives of the men, women and children who mined coal

programme.desc: The chefs gastronomic road trip reaches a conclusion as he arrives in Istanbul, just in time for the bluefish season, which allows him the chance to enjoy a fishing expedition on the Bosphorus, one of the worlds most strategic waterways, which divides the city into two continents. Rick also cooks two much-loved local dishes - lavish kofte kebabs with pistachios, and kapuska, a hearty traditional Turkish cuisine stew from the Black Sea region, whose name is derived from the Russian word for cabbage

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: More stories from the documentary series that looks at the 28 bridges that cross the notorious Rio Grande, between Texas and Mexico, and provide a gateway for legitimate goods and a lucrative pipeline for illegal contraband, weapons and drugs. Officers in Eagle Pass seize over 15 kilograms of heroin and unveil a new cartel drug-smuggling tactic, and a Mexican family in Laredo makes a plea for humanitarian parole

programme.title: How Britain Worked
programme.desc: Guy Martin helps with the £500,000 restoration of the oldest surviving Brixham sailing trawler, a vessel that launched the modern fishing industry and transformed the way a nation ate. Guy learns about the boats design, tests his own version of an Industrial Revolution life jacket, and makes rope using the original machines used for Nelsons HMS Victory. He also experiences deep-sea trawling and discovers how Britain acquired its taste for fish and chips

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The trio of motoring enthusiasts embark on another epic road trip, this time across western America in front-engined supercars. Jeremy Clarkson pilots the Lexus LFA, which has a spectacularly high-revving V10 powerplant, Richard Hammond gets behind the wheel of the muscular Dodge Viper, and James May opts for a recent incarnation of Aston Martins Vanquish. On their journey from Las Vegas to Palm Springs via Los Angeles, the presenters tackle racing circuits and find themselves in a race against the police, before rushing to the Mexican border - and theres a terrifying penalty for the last man to arrive. Meanwhile, Fleetwood Mac drummer Mick Fleetwood rolls up his sleeves to thrash the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on a race from Londons Wembley Stadium to Milans San Siro, the home of Italian football giants AC and Inter. A price restriction leads Jeremy to grab the keys to a Shelby Mustang GT500, which costs the equivalent of £35,000 in America and packs a supercharged punch of more than 650bhp. James and Richard pin their hopes on the pan-European rail network in a bid to secure the prize of tickets to a top-flight football match, with nothing but a long journey home awaiting the losers. On the test track, Jeremy puts Toyotas GT86 coupe through its paces, and its promise of entertaining rear-wheel-drive handling should put a smile on his face. Plus, singer-songwriter Amy Macdonald gets to grips with the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Lynley faces charges of intimidating a suspect, and is suspended from duty, meaning Havers and new partner DI Fiona Knight (guest star Liza Tarbuck) must investigate when the body of a woman is found in a lake. However, the detective involves himself in the case, compromising his chances of an unbiased trial. Crime drama, starring Nathaniel Parker and Sharon Small

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate a case of paranormal activity when they are approached by a wealthy member of the local trainspotting community. Drama, starring Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.sub-title: Wipe That Smile off Your Tape
programme.desc: Sharon joins a video dating agency and asks Darren to shoot a rehearsal tape, while Garth buys tickets for a Rolling Stones concert

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: An Appetite for Murder: Part Two
programme.desc: Police investigate the chefs death but a new development makes them rethink everything they have learned so far. Susan Lynch guest stars.

programme.desc: The girls aunt is taken to hospital with a broken leg, and its up to them to decide whether she goes to an old peoples home or comes to stay at their house. Comedy, starring Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke

programme.sub-title: Thug on the Tyne - Part One

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Ruth accepts an offer of help from Michelle and vows to leave Davey. Meanwhile, Nick tries to find out the underlying cause of a patients distress when she starts suffering from panic attacks, and Archies plans for a romantic night with Melody are thwarted

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: George clashes with a childs mother who is refusing to allow her toddler to have the MMR vaccine, and Ruth returns home to find Davey has left her. Archie is annoyed when he discovers JJ is going to be staying with Melody, but agrees to put his feelings to one side and attempt to get to know him

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Zubin arranges for Ric to be reunited with his estranged son, a situation that becomes complicated when it transpires his girlfriend is six months pregnant and hooked on drugs. When she goes into premature labour, it falls to Jess and Zubin to save the baby. Connie leaves Will to handle an emergency heart operation on his own, but Mickie comes to the rescue, displaying surprising surgical skills. Former EastEnders actress Lucy Speed guest stars as a patient expecting quads

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer embarks on a journey across the country, meeting a diverse array of people and encountering exotic wildlife. He begins in Northern Territory, where he discovers how the camel is threatening the fragile desert ecosystem, then heads through wine country to the South Australian city of Port Lincoln to dive with critically endangered southern blue fin tuna. In Western Australia, he joins a 21st-century gold rush and ends his first leg in state capital Perth, where he meets a former binman from Hull who now has a house in the sun, a private pool and his own boat

programme.desc: Gaz and Lee blue light to a lady whos been involved in an incident with a bin lorry, while Simone and Claire are called to a pensioner whos fallen in her bedroom

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: An old costume proves to be Terrys undoing when he is persuaded to dress up for a dinner party

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer embarks on a journey across the country, meeting a diverse array of people and encountering exotic wildlife. He begins in Northern Territory, where he discovers how the camel is threatening the fragile desert ecosystem, then heads through wine country to the South Australian city of Port Lincoln to dive with critically endangered southern blue fin tuna. In Western Australia, he joins a 21st-century gold rush and ends his first leg in state capital Perth, where he meets a former binman from Hull who now has a house in the sun, a private pool and his own boat

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The author and adventurer continues his Australian journey in Kakadu, the countrys largest national park, where he works through the night with a team committed to culling the poisonous feral cane toads that are threatening the regions wildlife. He then learns how to survive off the land using ancient Aboriginal knowledge as he heads out on patrol with a unique military unit in the remote northern Bush, before attempting to catch box jellyfish on Cape York Peninsula with a group of scientists who believe the species deadly venom may have medicinal qualities. Finally, Simon flies 100 miles out over the ocean to watch a large tanker being guided through the Great Barrier Reef

programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums
programme.desc: Comedy sketches, with Harry as Il Postino Pat, and Dawn French as his beloved Signora Goggins. Also featuring the Self-Righteous Brothers and Kevin the Teenager

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: After a day spent house-hunting, the newlyweds take up an invitation from Nessa and Smithy to relax with a trip to the bowling alley. However, when tensions between Gavin and Stacey reach a head at the end of the night, their two friends begin to regret making the offer

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Dave is unhappy about Nessas plans to let Smithy see the baby, while Stacey ensures Gavin sticks to his promise as she tries to find a new job. Meanwhile, Dawn and Pete join Pam and Mick for a beer and curry night. Comedy, starring Joanna Page and Mathew Horne

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary agrees to see a relationship counsellor, while Tonys efforts to impress Deborahs mother end in disaster. To compound their woes, the duo fear the arrival of Dorothys 10-year-old nephew will ruin their efforts to act maturely. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: The Green Green Grass

programme.desc: Documentary examining the murder of a young French nanny, 21-year-old Sophie Lionnet, whose body was then burned in the back garden of a south London home. Featuring interviews with friends, neighbours and Old Bailey reporters

programme.title: Bad Girls Behind Bars
programme.desc: Shoplifter and addict Linda is already planning her next big heist - stealing the ingredients for a celebratory feast when she gets out. But when jail life becomes depressingly familiar, she is forced to accept that confronting her demons may be the only way to break her cycle of addiction and crime

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: The film-maker looks back on his documentaries about the criminal justice system in the US. Louis reflects on his reports on the prison system, which exposed a world with its own rules and codes and a system that seemed to be broken. He also revisits the documentaries he shot in Philadelphia and Milwaukee, where tensions between the African-American community and the police were already at boiling point years before the death of George Floyd

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: The film-maker looks back on his documentaries focused on families, including his trilogy of documentaries centred around the Westboro Baptist Church. He examines how the death of patriarch Fred Phelps has left members of the church divided. He also reflects on how physical and mental health or forces beyond control can threaten to derail family lives

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.sub-title: DIY SOS: Homes for Veterans - Part One
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team take on their most ambitious project to date and transform a whole street of run-down empty properties in Manchester into homes for veterans. They are joined by the local community, as well as Prince William and Prince Harry, who volunteer their assistance on site. In the first edition of the two-part special, the team builds houses for two former soldiers who fought in Iraq and Afghanistan and are suffering from post traumatic stress disorder. However, with the number of volunteers lacking and the buildings proving to be trickier than expected, the build is becoming the toughest yet

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.sub-title: DIY SOS: Homes for Veterans - Part Two
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team continue with their most ambitious project to date, with the assistance of the local community and two royal helpers, Prince William and Prince Harry. The second edition sees them create a home for a veteran, who is a triple amputee after an IED blew up in Afghanistan. They are also aiming to renovate the fronts of the houses on the street and put in new utilities, as well as creating a lasting legacy in the form of a support centre, which will help other veterans find homes and jobs

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team heads to Birmingham to transform the family home of parents Charlotte and Chris, whose twins were born prematurely and have a condition known as global development delay. It has slowed down their progress of walking and talking, but they are further hindered by their cramped house. Nick Knowles and the team join forces with a host of volunteers from the local community to rebuild the familys life and give them a better future
